competitions.product: Welcome to
competitions.product_info: Welcome to The Time Vault Club Where passion for horology meets opportunity. We exist to bring the world of exceptional watchmaking closer to you, from iconic Swiss craftsmanship to bespoke British design. Through our curated competitions, we give you the chance to discover and own watches most people only dream of. LIVE COMPETITION All of our prize draws are hosted live, so you can witness every moment as dream watches find new owners. With regular competitions featuring everything from iconic Swiss classics to standout modern releases, the next opportunity is always closer than you think. competitions.product: WIN A NEO-VINTAGE ROLEX EXPLORER II 16570 BOX & PAPERS SET
competitions.product_info: Home – Rolex Explorer II 16570 Box & Papers Set WIN A NEO-VINTAGE ROLEX EXPLORER II 16570 BOX & PAPERS SET Value: £7,000 Duration: 7 Days Age: Dated 2001 Max. Entries: 699 Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 19/05/26 The Rolex Explorer II is one of the modern classic wristwatches , and this is an excellent example of the increasingly collectible 16570 reference . The watch dates to 2001 , features the attractive black dial , and is unpolished , still retaining its original green case back sticker – it looks to have had minimal wear throughout its life so far. The watch comes with its original box, papers, booklets, tags and more , and was originally sold in Kuwait . 18.88% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 132 699 18.88% 567 Tickets remaining 567/699 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 4 Days 19 Hours 55 Minutes 56 Seconds ENTER NOW WIN A ROLEX EXPLORER II 16570 BOX & PAPERS SET ENTER NOW 18.88% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 132 699 18.88% 567 Tickets remaining 567/699 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 4 Days 19 Hours 55 Minutes 56 Seconds Value: £7,000 Duration: 7 days Age: Dated 2001 Entries: 699 Max. Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 19/05/2026 The Rolex Explorer II is one of the modern classic wristwatches , and this is an excellent example of the increasingly collectible 16570 reference . The watch dates to 2001 , features the attractive black dial , and is unpolished , still retaining its original green case back sticker – it looks to have had minimal wear throughout its life so far. The watch comes with its original box, papers, booklets, tags and more , and was originally sold in Kuwait . #25 - The Rolex Explorer II 16570 w/ Box & Papers Collector's Set 2001 The History— The Example The Rolex Explorer II 16570 was introduced in 1989 and has become one of the great modern classic Rolex sports references – appreciated for its slim proportions, practical dual-time functionality and understated tool-watch character. This example dates to 2001 and features the attractive black dial , giving the watch a sharp, purposeful look on the wrist. It is also unpolished , still retaining its original green caseback sticker , suggesting minimal wear throughout its life so far. Powered by the Rolex calibre 3185 , the 16570 features an independently adjustable hour hand, allowing the wearer to track a second time zone with ease – a genuinely useful complication while retaining the clean, robust feel of a professional Rolex. This watch is accompanied by its original box, papers, booklets, tags and accessories , and was originally sold in Kuwait , adding an extra layer of provenance. A superb, honest and highly complete Explorer II – increasingly collectible, beautifully preserved and exactly the kind of example collectors look for. ENTER NOW The First Competition of its Kind The Vintage Watch Draw is unique. We’re the first competition website dedicated to collector-grade vintage watches, backed by a trusted expert. After the initial idea over five years ago, we’re so excited to now bring this new concept to you. Curated by A Trusted Expert Our competitions are curated by Alex Stevens, a trusted & reputable vintage watch specialist with lifelong experience in the trade. 12 Month Service Warranty Every watch is fully serviced by our watchmaker & comes with a 12 month mechanical warranty, so you can enjoy your watch hassle-free. Collector-Grade Condition Every watch is meticulously curated by Alex, known for selecting only the finest, collector-grade examples in terms of condition & originality. Low & Transparent Odds We don’t flood the draw with tickets. Our competitions are deliberately limited to keep odds low & your chance of winning fair. Authenticity Guarantee Every watch is thoroughly inspected & fully authenticated by our in-house expert. We are professionals, not enthusiasts or hobbyists. Guaranteed Draws Every draw ends on the stated date, no matter what. We never extend our competitions, even if we haven't sold all the tickets. The watch is absolutely stunning. It’s got that classic charm and you can feel the history in every detail. The condition is immaculate for a piece of its age.
